name: Lindy's Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter, cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the vanilla bean lengthwise and scrape the seeds into a bowl. Add flour, sugar, and zest. Stir in egg yolk.
2. Mix in butter and salt. Knead dough until it forms just a texture.
3. Flatten dough into a round shape and chill wrapped in wax paper for 1 hour.
4. Remove sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Lightly oil the bottom.
5. Press some dough, 1/8-inch thick, onto the bottom.
6. Bake in the middle of a preheated 400°F oven for 10-12 minutes until golden. Chill.
7. Butter the sides, attach to the bottom, and press remaining dough, 1/8-inch thick, to the side, sealing it to the bottom crust.
8. In a bowl with an electric mixer, beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, zests, and vanilla until smooth.
9. Beat in eggs and egg yolks one at a time, lightly after each addition.
10. Stir in heavy cream. Pour filling into prepared crust.
11. Bake in the middle of a preheated 550°F oven for 12 minutes.
12. Reduce heat to 200°F and bake an additional 60 minutes.
13. Let cool in pan on rack. Chill overnight, then remove sides of pan.
